allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKCU:\\Software\\Sparx Systems\\EAAddins" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.PSChildName; $v = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath; "$p => Default='$\($v.'\(default\)'\)' DLL='$\($v.DLL\)' CallListed='$\($v.CallListed\)'" })

PowerShell($progId = "ClassifierTagSync.Addin"; $clsid = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKCR:\\$progId\\CLSID" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).'\(default\)'; "ProgID CLSID: $clsid"; if \($clsid\) { $codebase = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKCR:\\CLSID\\$clsid\\InprocServer32" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CodeBase; "CodeBase: $codebase"; $asm = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKCR:\\CLSID\\$clsid\\InprocServer32" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Assembly; "Assembly: $asm" })
